zh.lifeSummary: 當John Williams於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特時，他的父親John Williams34歲，母親Margaret Smith17歲。他於大約1508年與Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年9月13日在英國倫敦享年85歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特多爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Williams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of William , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is also common in Wales. In North America, this surname has also absorbed some cognates from other languages, such as Dutch Willems . Williams is the third most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans.

History: This surname was brought to North America from southern England and Wales independently by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. Roger Williams, born in London in 1603, came to MA in 1630, but the clergyman was banished from the colony for his criticism of the Puritan government; he fled to RI and founded Providence.

variants.name: Wiliams
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Williams  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Pulliam
meanings: Welsh and English: Anglicized form of Welsh ap William ‘son of William’ (see Williams ). This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Williams was born about 1465, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Williams, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Smith, was 17. He married Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington about 1508, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 September 1549, in London, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Dorchester, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Williams est né environ 1465, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Williams, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Smith, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington environ 1508, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1549, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.Winterborne Herringston, Dorset, England: Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, England, United Kingdom

Er hat um 1508 in England, United Kingdom Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. September 1549 im Alter von 85 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Dorchester, Dorset, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington circa 1508, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1549, nel London, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Dorchester, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Williamsが約1465年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父John Williamsは34歳，母Margaret Smithは17歳であった。約1508年にイギリスイギリスでMargery Baker Lady baroness Of Herringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年9月13日にイギリスロンドンで85歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトドールチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Williams(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Williams(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Smith(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1508년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 9월 13일 영국 런던에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 도르체스터에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington aproximadamente 1508, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ro.Winterborne Herringston, Dorset, England: Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Williams родился около 1465 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Williams было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Smith, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington около 1508 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 сентября 1549 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия.
